heading: Wednesday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. A rising chance of rain showers near and south of Route 9, chance north to Route 4; areas of wintry mix in the southern Greens. Lows from the mid 20s to lower 30s north, and upper 20s to mid 30s in the south. North to northeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday
text: Mostly cloudy. Periods of rain south, and some wintry mix, mainly over high terrain, a rising chance north in the afternoon, except chance late in the Northeast Kingdom and northern New Hampshire. Valley highs from the upper 30s to mid 40s. East to southeast winds 5 to 10 mph.

heading: Thursday Night
text: Mostly cloudy. Showers of rain or wintry mix north, and in the southern Greens; mainly rain showers elsewhere in the south. Lows from the upper 20s to mid 30s, except mid 30s to around 40 in the broad valleys west. South and southeast winds around 5 mph east of the Greens, 5 to 15 mph in the west and, gusting to 30 mph in the Champlain Valley.
